name: Spaghetti Code
description: Code with complex, tangled control structure that is difficult to follow and maintain.
symptoms: Deep nesting of conditionals and loops
consequences: High risk of introducing bugs when changing

refactoring_strategies.name: Extract Method
refactoring_strategies.description: Pull out logical sections into named methods

refactoring_strategies.name: Replace Conditional with Polymorphism
refactoring_strategies.description: Use strategy pattern instead of long conditionals

refactoring_strategies.name: Guard Clauses
refactoring_strategies.description: Use early returns to reduce nesting

refactoring_strategies.name: Decompose Conditionals
refactoring_strategies.description: Extract condition and branches into methods
